[DATE_TIME]. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules
The following documents are filed as part of this report:
(1) Financial Statements:
Report of Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm
Consolidated Statement of Income for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME]
Consolidated Statement of Comprehensive Income for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME]
Consolidated Balance Sheet at [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME]
Consolidated Statement of Changes in Shareholders’ Equity for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME]
Consolidated Statement of Cash Flows for [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME]
Notes to Consolidated Financial Statements
(2) Schedules:
None
(3) Index to Exhibits
With the exception of the information expressly incorporated herein by reference, the [DATE_TIME] Proxy Statement shall not be deemed filed as part of this Annual Report on Form 10-K.
(1) Filed Herewith.
(2) Exhibit is a management contract or compensatory plan or arrangement.
(3) The instance document does not appear in the interactive data file because its XBRL tags are embedded within the inline XBRL document.
Item 16. Form 10-K Summary
Not applicable.
Signatures
Pursuant to the requirements of Section 13 of the Securities Exchange Act of [DATE_TIME], the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized.
Date: [DATE_TIME]
Bank of America Corporation
By: /s/ [PERSON]
Chief Executive Officer
